creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
The group has been created: https://reviews.freebsd.org/project/profile/88/

I can't add watchers to this project, the permission model of phabricator model is very restrict and even administrator cannot touch many things  via the web interface. Anyway, anyone can join a project as a watcher and will be notified when that group has been added as a group viewer. I hope this fulfill what you need.
